values.description: Base URL of the running Jira Mock service
Fixed Bearer token. Only this value is accepted by the mock. Used as: Authorization: Bearer mock-jira-token-2025
Issue key used in Read / Edit / Delete / Transition requests. Auto-updated when you run Create Story or Create Bug.

Auto-populated by Get Transitions. Values: 1=To Do, 2=In Progress, 3=Done
